pokemon:iron-moth.name: Iron Moth
pokemon:iron-moth.summary: This Pokémon resembles an unknown object described in a paranormal magazine as a UFO sent to observe humanity.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: This Pokémon resembles an unknown object described in a paranormal magazine as a UFO sent to observe humanity.
No records exist of this species being caught. Data is lacking, but the Pokémon’s traits match up with an object described in an old book.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: This Pokémon resembles an unknown object described in a paranormal magazine as a UFO sent to observe humanity.

form:iron-moth.name: Iron Moth
form:iron-moth.summary: Iron Moth form with Fire / Poison typing.
